name: MANNKIND CORP
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Unless the context requires otherwise, the words MannKind, we, Company, us and our refer to MannKind Corporation and its subsidiaries. We are a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to transforming chronic disease care through innovative, patient-centric solutions. Focused on cardiometabolic and orphan lung diseases, we develop and commercialize treatments that address serious unmet medical needs, including diabetes, pulmonary hypertension, and fluid overload in heart fail...
